seo.description: Create polls online for free, schedule meetings, and collect availability in minutes. Participants can vote without registration.

hero.title: Simple polls for better decisions
hero.subtitle: Create polls and schedule meetings in minutes. Participants can vote without registration.

singleChoice.title: Single Choice
singleChoice.description: Let participants choose one option from many

calendar.title: Calendar Polls
calendar.description: Find the best time for everyone

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.step1Description: Set up your poll in seconds with our pixel-crafted interface
howItWorks.step2Description: Send the link or QR code to participants
howItWorks.step3Description: View real-time results and make decisions together

create.title: Create a Poll
create.pollTitlePlaceholder: What would you like to decide?
create.dateOptionsDescription: Add dates and times for participants to choose from
create.specifyTimesDescription: Include start and end times for each option
create.noDatesSelected: Click on the calendar to select dates

vote.title: Cast Your Vote
vote.selectionRequired: Please select at least one option
vote.notAvailable: I'm not available for any date
vote.notAvailableDescription: Select this option if none of the proposed dates work for you

actions.deleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{title}"? This action cannot be undone and all votes will be lost.

empty.title: No polls yet
empty.description: Create your first poll to get started

myPolls.title: My Polls
myPolls.description: Manage and view results of polls you created

votedPolls.title: Polls I Voted In
votedPolls.description: Polls created by others where you participated

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account
login.emailNotConfirmedDescription: You need to confirm your email before you can sign in. Check your inbox.
login.resendError: Could not resend. Try 'Forgot password' instead.

signup.title: Create an account
signup.subtitle: Get started with Planora
signup.name: Full Name
signup.checkEmail: Check your email for the confirmation link!
signup.emailRateLimit: Too many email requests in a short time. Please wait about 60 seconds and try again.

confirm.title: Check your email
confirm.description: We've sent you a confirmation link to complete your registration.
confirm.instructions: Click the link in the email to activate your account and start using Planora.
confirm.spam: Can't find the email? Check your spam folder.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.emailSentTo: We've sent a reset link to
forgotPassword.checkSpam: Can't find the email? Check your spam folder.
forgotPassword.notReceivedTip: If you didn't receive the confirmation email during registration, you can use this feature to activate your account.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password
resetPassword.invalidLinkDescription: The password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new link.

errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.pollNotFoundDescription: This poll may have been deleted or the link is incorrect.
errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action
errors.notOwner: You are not the owner of this poll
